title: Marrying victim doesn't absolve accused of rape under POCSO: Delhi High Court
description: The Delhi High Court on Thursday observed that subsequent marriage between rape accused and minor victim not absolve him of the offence of repeated rape under Protection of Children from Sexual Offences Act (POCSO Act) [Gayassudin Vs State of NCT of Delhi].Justice Girish Kathpalia made this observation while declining bail to a person accused under the POCSO Act who had later married the victim after she lodged criminal case against him.“Of course, as per documents on record, on 12.02.2026, the
